mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, file_name, file_path, file_type, status, create_time, update_time FROM document WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, user_id, file_name, file_path, file_type, status, create_time, update_time FROM document ORDER BY update_time DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, user_id, file_name, file_path, file_type, status, create_time, update_time FROM document WHERE status = 2 ORDER BY update_time DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO document (user_id, file_name, file_path, file_type, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileType}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE document SET file_name=#{fileName}, file_path=#{filePath}, status=#{status}, update_time=#{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
